fields.Front: Volume of molasses released during the 1919 Great Molasses Flood?
What caused the structural failure that triggered the Erfurt latrine disaster?
fields.Back: The combined weight of the heavy gathering of nobles caused the floor of the building to collapse through the ground floor into the latrine cesspit below.

fields.Front: Approximately how long did the Tanganyika laughter epidemic last from its initial outbreak until it completely died off?
Exactly how many frozen pizzas were destroyed during the Great Michigan Pizza Funeral, and what were the toppings?
Roughly how many people are estimated to have compulsively taken to dancing for weeks during the Dancing Plague of 1518?
